item.name: Eggshilaration System Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of some unknown material. Placing it near your reprogrammed eggshilaration system will magically bring the machine to life.

mount.name: Eggshilaration System
mount.action: Call into battle your eggshilaration system. Egg puns required for propulsion.
mount.description: After learning of the latest of the Dreamer's visions─a giant floating ovoid delivering eggs to all the good boys and girls of the realm─Nonotta and friends literally scrambled to find a means of bringing her dream to life. All it required was a little aid from the Sons of Saint Coinach...and the remnants of some ancient Allagan technology.
mount.tooltip:
Why do the Qiqirn suck eggs?
- Acolyte Ba Go
